beer.beer_description: Hopped with Cashmere and Citra, Technical Tap is packed with layers of rockmelon, sweet lemon-lime, and ripe pineapple, followed by a splash of grapefruit juice and delicate floral aromatics. It’s a refined, layered IPA that hits with a bright citrus lift and stays refreshing with every sip.

Hopped with Cashmere and Citra, Technical Tap is packed with layers of rockmelon, sweet lemon-lime, and ripe pineapple, followed by a splash of grapefruit juice and delicate floral aromatics. It’s a refined, layered IPA that hits with a bright citrus lift and stays refreshing with every sip.

items.checkin_comment: Lovely lemon-lime tapper. Has a nuisance of sweet and tart that’s hard to explain. Nice to get some Bracket close to home. Holding out for the next brewery adventure 🤞

items.checkin_comment: Murky brownish orange with a near cm of white head. Tropical aroma of coconut, mandarin, citrus blossoms. Cleaner than it looks with some earthy and lime notes as well as some stemmy herbs. Little bitterness. Interesting fruity hops, lacks a little shape.
